title: Factory schema
description: Look up the complete live Factory JSON Schema—definitions, fields, constraints, defaults, enums, and examples—on a stable deep-linkable docs route.

whatItCovers.title: What It Covers
whatItCovers.body: This reference shows the live Factory JSON Schema from the you-agent-factory API package. Use it to look up definitions, fields, constraints, defaults, enums, and examples for Factory configuration. Field and definition descriptions come from the package schema itself.

schemaLookup.title: Schema Lookup
schemaLookup.body: Browse the complete Factory schema below. Filter by definition or field name, follow $ref links to related definitions, and copy deep links to any definition or field anchor on this page.
